description: A pull-down menu control; children are the menu items (Button, Divider, Section). Optionally replaces the title with a custom label view.

children.description: Menu items — typically Button, Divider, or Section elements

label.description: Single custom view shown as the menu trigger instead of title (e.g. Image with SF Symbol)

title.description: Text label for the menu trigger; ignored when a custom label view is provided
